title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.465 - Purple Heart Trail designated for portion of I-57 in Mississippi and Scott Counties
text:
227.465.  Purple Heart Trail designated for portion of I-57 in Mississippi and Scott Counties. — The portion of Interstate 57 from the Missouri/Illinois state line in Mississippi County continuing south to U.S. State Highway 60/State Highway AA in Scott County shall be designated the "Purple Heart Trail".  Costs for such designation shall be paid by private donations.
(L. 2021 S.B. 258)
